channel.title: Elton Chang — Build log
channel.description: Short updates on software engineering, data science, and machine learning work.

item.title: OG image, RSS, writing hub
item.description: Dedicated 1200×630 og-image.png (regenerate with scripts/generate_og_image.py). Mobile menu closes on outside click. Phase 3: RSS at feed.xml (regenerate with scripts/generate_feed.py), writing.html hub for guides, robots.txt + sitemap.xml. Log entries now have stable anchors (#log-entry-YYYY-MM-DD) for RSS links.

item.title: Phase 2 polish
item.description: Projects page: filter chips for SWE / Data / ML plus role tags on each card. Mobile nav uses a hamburger + full-width panel. Added favicon, Open Graph + Twitter cards, and a sample video embed below (Big Buck Bunny—replace with your own vlog id anytime).

item.title: Build log is live
item.description: Added a daily-style build log to the site: short notes on what I'm shipping, learning, or reading. Entries live in data/log.json—push a commit to publish.

item.title: Portfolio positioning
item.description: Refined the home narrative around software engineering, data science, and ML engineering. The goal is a single scan for recruiters: who I am, what I build, and that I iterate in public.
